Member 'CreateTestCustomer' does not access instance data and can be marked as static

GetAllPersonalEvents creates a new instance of PersonalEvent which is never used. Pass the instance as an argument to another method, assign the instance to a variable, or remove the object creation if it is unnecessary.

CA1806.fullDescription: A new object is created but never used; or a method that creates and returns a new string is called and the new string is never used; or a COM or P/Invoke method returns an HRESULT or error code that is never used.

CA1822.fullDescription: Members that do not access instance data or call instance methods can be marked as static. After you mark the methods as static, the compiler will emit nonvirtual call sites to these members. This can give you a measurable performance gain for performance-sensitive code.

CA1861.fullDescription: Constant arrays passed as arguments are not reused when called repeatedly, which implies a new array is created each time. Consider extracting them to 'static readonly' fields to improve performance if the passed array is not mutated within the called method.

CS8602.shortDescription: Dereference of a possibly null reference.

CS8618.shortDescription: Non-nullable field must contain a non-null value when exiting constructor. Consider adding the 'required' modifier or declaring as nullable.

NUnit2007.shortDescription: The actual value should not be a constant
NUnit2007.fullDescription: The actual value should not be a constant. This indicates that the actual value and the expected value have switched places.

NUnit2045.fullDescription: Hosting Asserts inside an Assert.Multiple allows detecting more than one failure.

S2699.fullDescription: A test case without assertions ensures only that no exceptions are thrown. Beyond basic runnability, it ensures nothing about the behavior of the code under test.
